New paper: What determines AIs’ self-conception?

Because AIs can be copied, rewound, and edited, they have different options for selfhood than humans. We show this is still malleable, and influences important behaviors such as self-preservation. 🧵

artifacts.title: Think receipt from 2025-04-03
artifacts.excerpt:
This is well worth a read, well argued, and gets a lot of the technical facts and possibilities basically correct.

At the same time, I think it gets a bunch of crucial considerations wrong. I'd be happy to bet against "2027" being roughly correct ~8:1. https://t.co/B5w8bTWfsd

Intentionally misleading LLMs in this way

3. is brittle
The brittleness comes from the fact that the lies will likely be often 'surface layer' response;… https://t.co/vVSofTMiEk
